name: Chicken & Spaghetti, IV
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken in water until cooked through.
2. Remove and debone the chicken, then add it to a separate pot with enough broth to make 2 quarts of liquid.
3. Cook the spaghetti in the broth until most of the liquid is absorbed.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: chopped celery and chicken bouillon cubes.
5. Stir until combined and serve.
